$comment: Machine-readable class-rename map for @ponchia/ui upgrades. Generated-by-hand from CHANGELOG BREAKING sections; consumed by docs/migrations/*.md and any codemod/sed recipe. 'safe' rules are mechanically rewritable (whole-class-token, no semantic change); 'manual' rules need human judgement (concept moved, not a 1:1 rename).

migrations.summary: Entire non-ui-* legacy vocabulary removed; everything is now under the .ui-* contract and the check-classes drift gate.

manual.old: hero / project-* / post-card / essay-* / page-* / home-* / signal-panel / worklog-summary
manual.note: Long-form content: .ui-prose / .ui-quote. Cards: .ui-card. Layout: .ui-grid / .ui-stack. Site chrome: the ui-site* shell. No 1:1 mapping — re-compose with the content primitives.
Tone modifiers differ (.ui-alert--info/-success/-warning/-danger); re-pick the tone.
Now scoped to the admin shell vocabulary; standalone stat usage should wrap in .ui-app-metrics.
Compact variant .tag-list--compact → .ui-tags--compact; verify accent-on-accent contrast (see CHANGELOG 0.3.0 a11y fix).

migrations.codemod: See docs/migrations/0.2-to-0.3.md for a ready-to-run ripgrep+sed recipe covering the 'safe' rules.
